title.en: In the following years, Ye Tian waited for a lo...

content.en:
The Knowing Realms of the Wuji Heavenly Palace withdrew, which was naturally a good thing for Ye Tian.

In this way, he could bring the resources in the Infinite Domain back to the Eternal Realm, thus helping the Terrans cultivate more Origin Upper Realm Overlords and Supreme Dao Realms.

Otherwise, it would be too difficult to cultivate some Supreme Dao Realms just by relying on the resources of the Origin Realm.

Especially his son Ye Xingchen, who is following the same path as him, and the resources he needs are unimaginable.

"I can't come back for the time being, wait for a while longer to see, if the Wuji Heavenly Palace really gives up on this Origin Realm, I will let the other replica bodies come back secretly!" Ye Tian said darkly.

In the following years, Ye Tian waited for a long time.

this day.

He copied the bodies of other Supreme Dao Realms and came to this vicinity to see if there were any Supreme Dao Realms hidden in the shadows.

As a result, no trace of other supreme realms was found.

He walked around and left.

At this time, he was sure that the Wuji Heavenly Palace had really withdrawn.

After all, this territory is a barren land in the Infinite Domain, and there are no resources, so staying in this area in the Dao Realm is a waste of time, and it is difficult to progress in cultivation.

Therefore, in the absence of other benefits, the Infinite Heavenly Palace would not have been sent to the Dao Realm to garrison here for a long time.

Of course.

Even if the Wuji Heavenly Palace gave up that Wuji Supreme Dao Fruit, he had to be careful not to expose it, otherwise the powerhouses of the Wuji Heavenly Palace would definitely hunt him down again.

......

Xuanlin Mountain Boundary.

Another long time passed, and the eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item on Ye Tian's body was completely exhausted.

At this time, he made a preliminary calculation, and based on the division of the ninth sequence rules, he deduced that his current eighth sequence to the Dao rule realm should be in the realm of two into three, which was already a very high realm.

In the years that followed, he devoted himself to creating the eighth sequence of Dao supernatural powers.

He felt like he was about to create.

Sure enough, a solstice era years later.

Ye Tian finally created the first eighth sequence of the Dao Divine Power, this eighth sequence of the Supreme Dao Divine Power was derived from the perfection of the Supreme Dao Extreme Spear Technique, and it was still named the Supreme Dao Extreme Spear Technique.

After creating this eighth sequence of Dao Divine Powers, Ye Tian's strength undoubtedly skyrocketed directly.

this day.

He found another Dao strange thing in the depths of the Xuanlin Mountain Realm, and the strength of this Dao strange thing is quite good, it is the Dao Qi Logistics Light Shuttle, which is based on speed.

It can be said that once the Dodge Logistics is defeated, it can completely escape, and it is extremely difficult to kill it.

Before creating the eighth sequence of the Dao Divine Power, Ye Tian was not at all sure about killing it.

But now, he's naturally confident.

At the beginning, Ye Tian hid his strength and was inseparable from the Dodge Logistics Light Shuttle.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian burst out and used all his strength to perform the eighth sequence of Dao Divine Power to Dao Extreme Spear Technique.

Rumble!!!!

This shot directly pierced the Dodge Logistics Light Shuttle, and then the various restricted Dao Divine Powers suppressed the other party, and the dense guns blocked any direction that the Dodge Logistics Light Shuttle might escape.

After a few moves, Dodge Logistics was killed and did not succeed in escaping.

"Kill it!"

Ye Tian was excited.

He actually didn't have much certainty, but after a move hit the Dodge Logistics Light Shuttle, the Dodge Logistics Light Shuttle couldn't escape.

And so.

He can take out the Dodge Logistics Light Shuttle.

In the Dodger Logistics Light Shuttle, he found a fragment of the core, which contained the origin power of the Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule, and it was much better than the Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item he had obtained before.

In this way, he can use this fragment to understand many years.

Another period of time has passed.

Ye Tian's cultivation finally entered the late stage of the First Rank Dao Realm with the help of countless resources in the depths of the Xuanlin Mountain Realm.

"The higher my cultivation, the resources here won't help me much!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He also understood that the greatest value of this Xuanlin Mountain Realm was these supreme Dao strange things, and although the other resources were very good, they were actually only of great use to the twofold Dao realm or the triple Dao realm.

But his combat power has actually reached the Quadruple Dao Realm, and his physical strength is comparable to the Quadruple Dao Realm, and many resources are not very helpful to him.

If he reached the peak realm of the First Rank Dao Realm, it was estimated that none of the resources here would be able to help him break through to the Rank Two Realm realm.

"Many resources in the depths of the Xuanlin Mountain Realm have been scraped by me, and it will take a lot of years to breed resources again, so it is better to take these resources out!" Ye Tian decided.

Of course, it would definitely not be possible for him to go out directly like this, so he had to go out as a disciple of Taisu Palace.

Thereupon.

In the following years, he secretly snooped to see if there were any disciples of Taisu Palace who had fallen in the Xuanlin Mountain Realm.

Once a disciple of Taisu Palace fell here, he would immediately copy the other party's body and go out.

Of course, he will still stay here with the replica body, looking for the most curious things.

Time flies.

this day.

Ye Tian saw that a disciple of Taisu Palace, who was not very strong, had fallen into the hands of some powerful creatures, and the Supreme Dao Realm under her command had also died.

"That's her!"

This disciple of Taisu Palace is named Xuan Yun, and he is in the middle of the Dao Realm, so it is estimated that he has no status in the Taisu Palace, otherwise he would not have brought only such a little to the Dao Realm.

Airplanes!

Xuan Yun copied the body and copied it successfully.

Although it was a woman to the Dao realm, Ye Tian didn't care, and he didn't know how many times he had copied a woman's body in the past.

Subsequently.

Xuan Yun copied his body and went out from the exit of Xuanlin Mountain Realm with all the resources he had collected over the years.

......

At the moment of going out from the exit, a Zun Tai Suwei looked over and saw that it was Xuan Yun who came out, but he didn't investigate carefully.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian left here as Xuan Yun, and then kept shuttling and came to a remote place, and then changed to another copy body.

After that, he continued to rush to the Origin Realm, where the Land of Eternity was located.

After a period of time, Ye Tian finally rushed back, and then returned to the land of eternity with his true body.

Tian Shan Pavilion.

The void cracked, Ye Tian's true body copy body returned, and those resources were successfully brought back.

"These resources are enough for the human race and the Tianshan Pavilion to give birth to a large number of Supreme Dao Realms!"

Ye Tian smiled.

Moreover, he can probably raise his cultivation to the peak realm of the Dao realm.

But if you want to break through to the Dual Dao Realm, you have to think of other ways.
